title: Integrations and Partners
text:
# Integrations and Partners

Optimize your process by integrating Criteria with your existing technology.

Greenhouse featured partner

#### Featured Partner

## Greenhouse

Greenhouse provides a transparent, branded candidate experience with application tracking and integrations for job boards and assessment tools.

Learn More

iCIMS

#### Featured Partner

## ICIMS Standard

ICIMS delivers a cloud-based talent acquisition platform with robust ATS features, integrating with background screening and assessment tools for end-to-end recruitment.

Learn More

HackerRank Featured Partner

#### Featured Partner

## HackerRank

HackerRank provides a tech hiring platform with coding tests and interviews to assess developer skills.

Learn More

Jobvite by employ

#### Featured Partner

## Jobvite

Jobvite delivers an integrated talent acquisition suite with ATS, sourcing, and onboarding features, supporting efficient pre-hire workflows.

Learn More

SmartRecruiters

#### Featured Partner

## SmartRecruiters

SmartRecruiters delivers a modern ATS with robust integration options, enabling efficient sourcing, screening, and pre-hire workflows.

Learn More

UKG featured partner

#### Featured Partner

## UKG Pro

UKG Pro Recruiting delivers an integrated ATS within its HCM suite, supporting seamless pre-hire workflows and compliance.

Learn More

gear icon

### Seamlessly Integrate

Our API technology makes it easy to integrate Criteria with the ATS or HRIS platform of your choice.

tech stack icon

### Best in Class Tech Stack

We designed our technology with flexibility in mind. Integrations enable you to build the best HR tech stack to fit your business needs.

out of the box icon

### Flexibility for You

We offer a wide range of integrations, including out-of-the-box integrations and custom solutions.

Looking to integrate? Talk to our team today.

Contact Us

## Technology Partners

We partner with a wide range of Applicant Tracking (ATS) and Human Capital Management (HCM) providers to help you streamline your hiring process.

Contact Us

## Why Integrate with Criteria

save time and money icon

### Save Time and Money

Reduce the costs and hours spent switching back and forth between platforms, and spend more time with your high-potential candidates.

streamline workflows icons

### Streamline Workflows

Cut down on the mindless administrative tasks by automating key parts of your talent funnel.

all in one place icon

### All in One Place

View all your hiring data in one place, so you can make a more informed hiring decision, faster. 

Discover the benefits of integrating your ATS with Criteria. 
 

Learn more

## Ready to make every hire a strategic asset and every team a powerhouse? 

Book a demo and test drive the user-friendly talent platform.  
 

Book a Demo
